blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 16 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,871 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
